data.description: Umbrella for the 2026-06-09 post-extraction audit, workstream 1: migration artifacts that are no longer relevant in standalone rebar — remaining dso references, orphaned/unreachable engine scripts, half-implemented features stranded by the extraction, stale docs. Previously-deferred Tier-D items (dso-named reconciler internals, dso_label Jira scheme, plugins.dso.* module keys) are now IN SCOPE: rebar is not dso-compatible and prior dso functionality can be freely broken. Child tasks carry the specifics.
data.title: Audit 2026-06-09: remove remaining dso/migration artifacts
